svg.text: Raw text → tokenisation → embeddings → attention → encoder / decoder → pre-train → fine-tune → decode → metrics
Unstructured natural language — any form, any domain
"Translate: The cat sat on the mat." · News articles · Customer reviews · Code comments · Q&A pairs
ambiguity, coreference, long-range dependencies, domain shift, multilingual, noisy/informal text
lowercase, strip HTML, remove control chars, unicode normalise (NFC), deduplicate lines
• Used by: T5, LLaMA, mT5, XLNet
input_ids [batch, seq_len] · attention_mask [batch, seq_len] · token_type_ids [batch, seq_len] · special tokens [CLS]=101, [SEP]=102
E(x) = TokenEmbed(id) + PositionalEmbed(pos) + SegmentEmbed(seg) → LayerNorm → Dropout
Scaled Dot-Product Attention — repeated H times in parallel (multi-head)
Step A — Project Q, K, V
Attention(Q,K,V) = softmax(QKᵀ / √d_k) · V MultiHead = Concat(head₁…headₕ) · W_O
Bidirectional: every token sees all tokens
Q = K = V = input embeddings, NO causal mask
Repeat N times (BERT-base: N=12, BERT-large: N=24)
Lower-triangular mask: token i cannot see token j>i
Repeat N times (GPT-2: N=12–48; GPT-4: est. N=96+)
Optimiser: AdamW · lr: 2e-5 → 5e-5 · warmup 6–10% · weight_decay 0.01 · gradient clip 1.0 · FP16 / BF16
• argmax P(xₜ | x₁…xₜ₋₁) at each step
• Top-k: sample from k most prob
Encoder-only: BERT · RoBERTa · ALBERT · DistilBERT · Decoder-only: GPT-2/3/4 · LLaMA · Mistral · Falcon · Encoder-Decoder: T5 · BART · mT5 · FLAN-T5
